info.title: Retrieve Claim API
info.description:
Returns **comprehensive claim details** for a warranty claim identified by **dealer account**, **segment**, and **work order number**. The legacy SOAP **Retrieve Claim** operation maps to this REST API; see your SOAP-to-REST field mapping and FAQ attachments for property-level details.

Support: Warranty_Api_Support@JohnDeere.com

servers.description: Sandbox (cert). Production uses `https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com` — confirm the path prefix under `/digcust/wy/` and whether the `cert` segment is present for your environment.

OAuth2.description: John Deere Dealer Solutions OAuth 2.0. Use the **authorization code** flow (three-legged) for interactive users, or the **client credentials** grant for machine-to-machine access. Request the OAuth scope assigned to your application for this API (this reference uses `warranty` as an example — confirm the scope in your Developer.Deere.com application and technical documentation).

ClaimDetail.description: Claim entity returned from **ClaimSet**. The exact properties depend on the OData contract and your SOAP-to-REST mapping; additional fields may appear.

workOrder.description: Work order number used in the lookup key.

dealerAccount.description: Dealer account identifier used in the lookup key.

segment.description: Segment code used in the lookup key.

claimNumber.description: Warranty claim number when present on the entity.

claimStatus.description: High-level claim status when returned by the service.

message.example: No claim was found for the supplied work order key.

get.summary: Get claim by dealer account, segment, and work order
get.description:
Retrieves **Claim** entities from **ClaimSet** using the OData-style key: dealer account, segment, and work order number.

**Sandbox example:** `GET https://jdws-api-sandbox.deere.com/digcust/wy/cert/WtyDbsRetrClaim/ClaimSet(DealerAccount='550012345',Segment='01',WorkOrder='WO-2026-00012345')`

**Production:** Use the production host (`https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com`) with the path pattern documented for your program (the `cert` segment or application id may differ from sandbox).

**Accept:** `application/json`

parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: Application or service instance segment for your Dealer Solutions integration (sandbox example: `WtyDbsRetrClaim`).

parameters.name: DealerAccount
parameters.description: Dealer account identifier in the ClaimSet key.

parameters.name: Segment
parameters.description: Segment code in the ClaimSet key.

parameters.name: WorkOrder
parameters.description: Work order number in the ClaimSet key.

200.description: Claim details returned for the supplied key.

400.description: Bad request — malformed key or invalid parameters.

error.message: The ClaimSet key could not be parsed.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid access token.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not include the required scope or organization access.

error.message: Access token is missing the required scope.

404.description: No claim found for the supplied dealer account, segment, and work order.

error.message: No claim was found for the supplied work order key.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
